item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon reports 3,500 Israeli ceasefire violations
item.description: Lebanese PM states Israel has bombed Lebanon nearly 3,500 times during the ceasefire period, raising concerns about sustained violations of the truce agreement.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump walks out of NBC interview on Iran strategy
item.description: Former President Trump stormed out of a tense NBC interview, calling it "fake dirty press" when reporters pushed back on his Iran war strategy positions.

item.title: 🇰🇭 Amnesty: Cambodia scam centre crackdown ineffective
item.description: A new Amnesty report finds that Cambodias performative crackdowns have failed to stop scam centres exploiting workers, despite government claims of progress.

item.title: 🇫🇷 French Army has recruits but lacks equipment
item.description: Frances deputy army chief reports a recruitment surplus but critical equipment shortages, highlighting the gap between personnel growth and military hardware capacity.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran claims Israeli strikes coordinated with US
item.description: Tehran says Israeli strikes on Iran were fully coordinated with the United States, escalating accusations of direct US involvement in the conflict.

item.title: 🇻🇦🇪🇸 Pope Leo XIV and Spain's Sánchez unite against Trump policies
item.description: Pope Leo XIV met with Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in Rome on Monday, discussing shared opposition to President Trump's policies. The meeting highlights growing international coordination against US trade and diplomatic moves.

item.title: ⚖️ Meta sues Israeli spyware firm NSO Group for violating WhatsApp injunction
item.description: Meta filed a federal court contempt order against NSO Group for violating a permanent injunction that barred the firm from targeting WhatsApp and its users.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Prime Minister Starmer set to ban harmful social media for under-16s
item.description: British PM Keir Starmer is expected to announce a ban on harmful online platforms for children under 16 while maintaining access to safer forms of social media.

item.title: 🇦🇫 UN urges Afghan Taliban to end arrests of women over dress rules
item.description: The United Nations mission in Afghanistan expressed concern over arrests of women for failing to comply with dress requirements and urged Taliban authorities to treat all people equally.

item.title: 🇰🇭 Amnesty: Cambodia scam centers still operating despite crackdowns
item.description: Dozens of suspected global scam compounds in Cambodia remain operational despite months-long crackdown by authorities, Amnesty International reported.

item.title: 💰 Gold prices hit over two-month low as strong US jobs data fuels rate-hike bets
item.description: Gold extended losses as strong US employment data increased market expectations for a Federal Reserve rate hike in December, with over 70% probability now priced in.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran blames US for latest exchanges of fire with Israel
item.description: Iran stated that overnight exchanges of fire with Israel will only worsen an already chaotic diplomatic process with the United States.

item.title: ⚔️ Israel strikes strategic defense systems across multiple areas in Iran
item.description: The Israeli military said it struck and dismantled Iranian defense systems deployed across several areas in Iran.

item.title: 🇵🇭🌊 Magnitude 7.8 Earthquake Strikes Philippines, Tsunami Warnings Issued
item.description: A powerful 7.8 magnitude earthquake hit off the southern Philippines island of Mindanao, killing at least 19 people and triggering tsunami warnings across the Pacific. Waves of up to 1 meter were observed in the Philippines, Indonesia, and Japan.

item.title: ☢️⚔️ SIPRI: All Nine Nuclear-Armed States Expanding Arsenals Amid Global Tensions
item.description: The Stockholm International Peace Research Institute reports that all nine nuclear-armed states are modernizing and expanding their arsenals. India increased its stockpile to 190 warheads, extending its lead over Pakistan which holds 170.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Ukraine and Russia Trade Air Attacks as Zelenskyy Pushes for Direct Talks
item.description: Russia and Ukraine exchanged deadly air attacks hours after President Zelenskyy met with European leaders to push for direct negotiations. The Ukrainian leader expressed willingness to freeze current battle lines to end the war.

item.title: 🇯🇵💴 Japanese Yen Lingers Above ¥160 to Dollar as BOJ Meeting Approaches
item.description: The yen traded back above ¥160 to the dollar, testing levels not seen in decades as markets await the Bank of Japan policy meeting. The currency remains under pressure from widening US-Japan interest rate differentials.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Armenian PM Pashinyan claims victory in parliamentary election
item.description: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan claimed victory in Armenia's parliamentary election, with early results showing his pro-Western party leading. The election was seen as a choice between closer ties with Europe or Russia.

item.title: 🇱🇻 NATO shoots down drone entering Latvia from Russia
item.description: NATO fighter jets shot down a drone that entered Latvian airspace from Russia, the latest in a series of security incidents along Europe's eastern border. The incident highlights ongoing tensions between Russia and NATO allies.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky's European allies set five conditions for peace talks with Russia
item.description: Britain, Germany and France outlined five conditions for Ukraine-Russia peace negotiations following talks with President Zelensky. The conditions come as Zelensky signaled willingness to freeze current battle lines to achieve peace.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices surge more than $4 as Israel-Iran strikes threaten ceasefire
item.description: Oil prices jumped by more than $4 per barrel as Israel conducted strikes on Iran and Lebanon, threatening the fragile ceasefire. Brent crude neared $98 despite OPEC+ approving another output hike.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Expands Nuclear Deterrence Pact to Scandinavia as Norway Opens Talks
item.description: Norway has become the latest ally to discuss joining France's extended nuclear deterrence initiative, as European defense cooperation deepens amid growing security concerns.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India Issues Fresh Travel Advisory for Iran, Urges Nationals to Leave Immediately
item.description: India has reiterated its travel advisory for Iran amid escalating regional tensions, advising Indian nationals to avoid travel and urging those present to depart immediately.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Defence Ministers Convene in Nicosia With Ukraine War Set to Dominate Agenda
item.description: The EU's 27 defence ministers are gathering in Cyprus on Monday, with the ongoing Ukraine conflict expected to be the primary focus of discussions.

item.title: 💰 Gold Prices Decline as Middle East Reescalation Dampens Safe-Haven Demand
item.description: Gold prices began the week with losses despite renewed Middle East tensions, as market dynamics shift amid the ongoing Israel-Iran conflict.
